---
title: "r-curriculum"
subtitle: "A Progressive Hands-on Introduction to R"
author: "Troy Altus"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-tools: true
---

## Overview

This repository contains a structured, progressive curriculum for learning R programming through practical demo scripts. Each script builds on the previous ones and uses general examples with clear exercises.

The curriculum emphasizes:
- Clean, readable code using the **tidyverse**
- Best practices (piping, consistent naming, reproducibility)
- Progressive difficulty
- Practical exercises at the end of each script

## Curriculum Map

| Script | Topic | Focus |
|--------|-------|-------|
| [Script 01](scripts/script-01-r-fundamentals.R) | R Fundamentals | Basic syntax, variables, data types, simple operations |
| [Script 02](scripts/script-02-data-structures-deep-dive.R) | Data Structures | Vectors, lists, matrices, data frames, tibbles |
| [Script 03](scripts/script-03-control-flow-and-functions.R) | Control Flow & Functions | Loops, conditionals, writing reusable functions |
| [Script 04](scripts/script-04-data-import-and-export.R) | Data Import & Export | Reading/writing CSV, RDS, Excel, and other formats |
| [Script 05](scripts/script-05-data-wrangling-with-dplyr-and-tidyr.R) | Data Wrangling | `dplyr` verbs (`filter`, `select`, `mutate`, `group_by`, `summarise`) and `tidyr` reshaping |
| [Script 06](scripts/script-06-ggplot2-visualization.R) | **Data Visualization** | `ggplot2`: scatter, bar, boxplot, faceting, themes, and saving plots |

## How to Use This Curriculum

1. Clone or download the repository
2. Open the project in **RStudio** or **VS Code**
3. Run `renv::restore()` to install required packages
4. Work through the scripts in order (they are numbered for a reason)
5. Try the exercises at the end of each script

## Project Structure

```bash
r-curriculum/
├── README.md
├── _quarto.yml
├── r-curriculum-overview.qmd
├── .gitignore
├── scripts/
│   ├── script-01-r-fundamentals.R
│   ├── script-02-data-structures-deep-dive.R
│   ├── script-03-control-flow-and-functions.R
│   ├── script-04-data-import-and-export.R
│   ├── script-05-data-wrangling-with-dplyr-and-tidyr.R
│   └── script-06-ggplot2-visualization.R
├── outputs/          # (for saved plots and results)
└── data/             # (optional sample data)
